import os, numpy as np, random
os.environ["HF_HUB_OFFLINE"] = "1"
from VLABench.utils.utils import load_env
random.seed(0); np.random.seed(0)
env = load_env("select_fruit")
ts = env.reset()
obs = env.get_observation(require_pcd=False)
print("ee_state shape:", obs["ee_state"].shape, "dtype:", obs["ee_state"].dtype)
print("ee_state values:", obs["ee_state"])
print("action_spec:", env.action_spec())
if "last_action" in obs:
    print("last_action:", obs["last_action"])
